stemHtml: What privilege does a Multi-Crew Pilot Licence (MPL) grant the holder?

options.a: To act as co-pilot on aeroplanes engaged in commercial air transport.
options.b: To act as PIC in both single- and multi-engine aircraft.
options.c: To act as PIC in non-commercial operations and co-pilot on transatlantic flights.
options.d: To act as co-pilot in commercial air transport and PIC in ultralight aircraft only.
